questions.question: Several protocol values have a fixed interpretation.
questions.explanation: Correct. Several protocol values have a fixed interpretation.

questions.question: Several protocol values The ::1 address that kernel installs on a loopback netdevice has this protocol value kernel_ra - IPv6 addresses installed in response to router advertisement messages kernel_ll - Link-local addresses have this protocol value The rest of the values are not reserved and the administrator is free to assign (or not to assign) protocol tags.
questions.explanation: Incorrect. Several protocol values have a fixed interpretation.

questions.question: Namely: kernel_lo - The ::1 address that kernel installs on a loopback netdevice has this protocol value kernel_ra - IPv6 addresses installed in response to router advertisement messages kernel_ll - Link-local addresses have this protocol value The rest of the values are not reserved and the administrator is free to assign (or not to assign) protocol tags.
questions.explanation: Correct. Namely: kernel_lo - The ::1 address that kernel installs on a loopback netdevice has this protocol value kernel_ra - IPv6 addresses installed in response to router advertisement messages kernel_ll - Link-local addresses have this protocol value The rest of the values are not reserved and the administrator is free to assign (or not to assign) protocol tags.

questions.question: ip address delete - delete protocol address Arguments: coincide with the arguments of ip addr add.
